heading: Service of process
label: 151308 Service of process
text: The corporation shall have a designated agent to receive service of process for the corporation.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15130836:5203(a)(4)., , .Oct. 26, 1992Pub. L. 102–522, title II, § 204(a)(4)106 Stat. 3419The words “at all times” are omitted as unnecessary and for consistency in the revised title. The word “have” is substituted for “maintain” for consistency in the revised title.
